problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Attention mechanism with linear complexity is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
